title: Spicy Chewy Indulgent British Tamarind Stir-fry
description: A whole30-friendly spicy and chewy dish featuring tamarind pulp in a savory sauce, perfect for adding some flavor to your meals.
instructions: Prepare the tamarind paste by mixing it with soy sauce in a bowl.
Dice the garlic cloves and set aside.
Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chicken strips, green onions, and diced garlic to sauté for about 5 minutes until golden brown.
Add tamarind sauce, red pepper flakes, and chilli oil/powder to the pan. Stir well and bring to a simmer. Let it cook for an additional minute to let flavors meld together.
In a small bowl, mix cornstarch with water until smooth. Pour this mixture into the pan and stir continuously until thickened. Cook for 1-2 more minutes.
Once thickened, turn off heat and serve hot.
